column1: # ZAP baseline rule suppressions for SecurePipe.
# threshold: IGNORE | INFO | WARN | FAIL | OFF

column3: Variant "Non-Storable Content" — fires because middleware sets Cache-Control: no-store. The original WARN ("Storable and Cacheable") was the real finding; this one is informational confirmation that the fix is in place.

Rule checks for Sec-Fetch-Dest on incoming requests. That header is browser-sent; ZAP (a scanner) doesn't include it. Cannot be fixed server-side — it's a meta-warning about the scanner itself, not the app.
